no_changes_rationale:
All four acceptance criteria are already satisfied in the worktree's
base-rev (03eb5607). The amendments and bundle were authored in commit
dc565a65 ("docs(metric): FEAT-005/TD-005 amendments + library/artifacts/met
bundle [ddx-41481396]") which has since been merged into main and is
ancestor of the current checkpoint.

Evidence:

  AC1 — FEAT-005 metric: block schema
    docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-005-artifacts.md lines 152-201
    documents the v1 metric: top-level frontmatter block (schema_version,
    unit, direction, goal, budget, source, scope) as a type-specific
    metadata example parallel to REF.

  AC2 — TD-005 exec-runs collection ownership (no rename to metric-runs)
    docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-005-metric-runtime-history.md
    section "Collection Ownership and v1 Amendments" (lines 230-261)
    explicitly states metric history is owned by the generic exec-runs
    collection and "No rename to metric-runs is implied or planned."

  AC3 — library/artifacts/met/{template,prompt,examples} bundle
    library/artifacts/met/template.md
    library/artifacts/met/prompt.md
    library/artifacts/met/examples.md
    All three files exist.

  AC4 — ddx doc audit clean
    The only integrity issue ddx doc audit reports is a pre-existing
    FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 -> FEAT-020 -> SD-013
    -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002 cycle that does not touch FEAT-005, TD-005,
    or any MET-* artifact, and predates this bead. It is out of scope
    here.

verification_command: test -f docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-005-artifacts.md && test -f docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-005-metric-runtime-history.md && test -f library/artifacts/met/template.md && test -f library/artifacts/met/prompt.md && test -f library/artifacts/met/examples.md && grep -q "^metric:" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-005-artifacts.md && grep -q "schema_version: 1" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-005-artifacts.md && grep -q "exec-runs" docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-005-metric-runtime-history.md && grep -q "No rename to" docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-005-metric-runtime-history.md
